approximate_counts.note: All counts are approximate and for cross-pass comparison only.

notes: Journal article treated as single-file extraction with bibliography split into a separate Markdown file. PDF has a machine-readable text layer; page 10 is blank. No figures, maps, plates, or image-only tables were detected. One private-use glyph in the text layer was visually checked and represented as l̥[?] in *h₁l̥[?]-mo-?.
